title: Pokemon
desc: A boy with superpowers and friends fights alien threats to protect the Earth from conquest.

title: Shinchan
desc: Shin-chan, a mischievous five-year-old, constantly disrupts the lives of those around him with his childish antics, generating humorous chaos and exasperation.

desc: Dori guides Sunflowerclass on emergencies; Shinchan and friends rescue a box-abandoned dog; and Shinchan's next adventure begins, unfolding new friendships and lessons for everyone watching.
